source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Petra Labs

Petra Labs is building the attribution and experimentation layer for AI search. We believe the future of commerce will be shaped by AI-driven information retrieval, yet most companies lack the infrastructure to understand and capitalize on this emerging growth channel. Petra Labs uses large-scale simulations, agentic analysis, and deeply embedded integrations to turn AI search from a black box into a measurable growth channel teams can rigorously optimize and allocate spend against.



Raised $5M+ in funding from Tier-1 VCs. We work in our SoHo, New York office.



Culture

 - We hire a small number of extremely talented people and give them as much ownership and autonomy as possible

 - We are truth-seeking. Transparent, direct discourse is encouraged. We challenge existing beliefs in pursuit of always getting better

 - We work hard and are unapologetic about the level of effort required to build a generational company



What You’ll Do

 - Define and build product end-to-end. Deeply understand user needs to iterate on, deploy, and scale software, with extreme ownership

 - Operate at the frontier. We tackle ambiguous, unsolved problems in AI search that require running experiments to uncover novel insights

 - Design and build large-scale systems, data models, and infrastructure



You’ll Excel in This Role If You

 - Can quickly and effectively decompose large, ambiguous problems and systems

 - Have built real products before and are comfortable owning large technical surfaces

 - Have strong fundamentals in system design and databases, with good judgment around when to move fast versus build for scale

Process

1. Hiring Manager Screen

2. Technical Interview

3. On-Site Interview

source_jobs.title: Growth & Marketing
source_jobs.description:
THE ROLE

You'll be the first person focused entirely on Petra Labs' own growth. Today, the vast majority of our pipeline comes from inbounds and referrals from success with our existing customers. That works - but it doesn't scale, and we're leaving demand on the table.

We need someone who can work with leadership on building the GTM engine from the ground up: generate qualified enterprise leads, create content that educates a market that barely knows this category exists, and run experiments across channels to find what converts.

"Founding" means what it sounds like - you'll own this function, shape the strategy, and have a direct line to the founders. We're seed-stage with meaningful equity for early team members who want to build something, not just join something.




WHAT YOU'LL DO




PIPELINE & DEMAND GEN

 - Build and run targeted outbound campaigns targeting enterprise marketing leaders (VPs/CMOs) in verticals we haven't locked down yet

 - Develop lead qualification frameworks - we can only take one client per vertical, so targeting precision matters more than volume

 - Create and optimize landing pages, email sequences, and paid campaigns

 - Track and report on pipeline metrics; own the funnel from awareness to qualified opportunity


CONTENT & CATEGORY CREATION

 - Write and produce content that educates the market on AI search optimization - blog posts, LinkedIn content, case studies, data reports

 - Translate our client results into compelling proof points (e.g., citation share gains, prompt ranking improvements)

 - Help position Petra Labs as the authority in a category we're defining

 - Support the founders' thought leadership with ghostwritten content, talking points, and social strategy


MARKETING OPS & EXPERIMENTATION

 - Set up and manage CRM, email automation, and analytics infrastructure

 - Run rapid experiments - test channels, messaging, formats, audiences

 - Build repeatable playbooks for what works; kill what doesn't

 - Manage marketing budget and ROI tracking




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We care more about how you think than where you've worked. Background is less important than raw ability and drive.

 - Sharp and resourceful - you figure things out fast, whether it's a channel you've never used, a tool you've never touched, or a market you've never sold into

 - Growth-minded - you're wired to find leverage; you think in systems, funnels, and feedback loops, not just campaigns

 - Strong writer - you can explain a complex, technical service in plain language that a CMO would forward to their team

 - Analytical - you default to data; you think in terms of conversion rates, CAC, and pipeline velocity, not vanity metrics

 - Self-directed - you don't need a playbook handed to you; you write the playbook

 - Hungry - you want to be early at something that matters, not comfortable at something that's already figured out




COMPENSATION & DETAILS

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity - this is a seed-stage founding team role

 - In-person in New York City

 - Reports directly to the founders

 - High autonomy, low bureaucracy, real ownership

source_jobs.title: Strategy & Ops
source_jobs.description:
About Petra Labs

Petra Labs is building the attribution and experimentation layer for AI search. We believe the future of commerce will be shaped by AI-driven information retrieval, yet most companies lack the infrastructure to understand and capitalize on this emerging growth channel. Petra Labs uses large-scale simulations, agentic analysis, and deeply embedded integrations to turn AI search from a black box into a measurable growth channel teams can rigorously optimize and allocate spend against.



Raised $5M+ in funding from Tier-1 VCs. We work in our SoHo, New York office.



Culture

 - We hire a small number of extremely talented people and give them as much ownership and autonomy as possible

 - We are truth-seeking. Transparent, direct discourse is encouraged. We challenge existing beliefs in pursuit of always getting better

 - We work hard and are unapologetic about the level of effort required to build a generational company



About the Role

You will own the customer relationship and do whatever it takes to help clients win. You’re a Swiss-army knife across sales, operations, and product. You’re sharp, fast-learning, and comfortable in high-stakes, ambiguous environments. You’ll surface insights from the field and translate them into clear product direction that moves the company forward.

notes: Small team with a strong focus on AI search and experimentation.
